action: Retrospective P5 (F5): make ship all-or-nothing. Cycle 246's ship committed to local main then died at verify-self-sha BEFORE push, stranding main ahead-1 (f01a323) — a state that confused all later observers and required operator archaeology. Either reorder steps so all verification precedes the first mutation (verify-sha + attestation BEFORE commit), or write a ship-in-progress marker with a deterministic resume (complete-or-rollback) that the next loop invocation honors. Acceptance: kill ship between commit and push -> next invocation either completes the push or rolls back the local commit, never leaves silent divergence.
